title: Unit 2 Lesson 11 Alternate First Declension Endings

content.text: Finally, there are two variations to the first declension nouns.
Words ending in rho, iota or epsilon will have singular nouns ending in alpha. Note that the plural nouns are unchanged.

Likewise, words ending in double sigma or ksi will have a hybrid pattern of endings in the singular. The nominative and accusative take alpha and the genitive and dative take eta.  Again, the plurals are unchanged.
